message:
test(fcp-core): pin ConnectorLifecycleState transitions (connector plan state analogue)

Adds crates/fcp-core/tests/connector_plan_state_transitions.rs (~286 LOC)
locking the documented state-machine transitions for fcp-core's connector
runtime-state ladder.

No type literally named `ConnectorPlanState` exists in fcp-core. The
closest runtime-state ladder for a connector instance is
`ConnectorLifecycleState` at crates/fcp-core/src/connector.rs:198, with
5 documented stages:

  Loaded → Activated → Running ↔ Suspended → Terminated

The existing `connector_lifecycle_state_display.rs` covered Display +
FromStr happy paths only. This pin extends coverage to:

  * Documented transition allow-list per the docstrings:
    Loaded → Activated
    Activated → Running | Terminated
    Running → Suspended | Terminated
    Suspended → Running | Terminated
    Terminated is absorbing
  * Self-loop rejection (no state transitions to itself)
  * Forbidden-edge denial (e.g. Loaded ↛ Running)
  * Serde tag matrix per variant (JSON + CBOR cross-format)

Closes flywheel_connectors-df5uj (Pin fcp-core ConnectorPlanState
transitions).
